text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whew, this Fan Fest was terrific! Oh! Student over there! Please do
your best next year too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Will do! Thank you for coming!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for today, Bamboo. Sorry I asked you to step in at the last
minute.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Course. It was no problem at all!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I gotta say though, when you suddenly called to ask if I still had last
year's outfit, it sure did throw me for a loop!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You got in touch so quickly, too... You must've been looking out for
King the whole time, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, Hey Nature, good work! I heard from Pearl. You took charge of
reorganizing the cheer locations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's nothing. Anyone could've done that. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Squad Member A
text_block_list.text: Captain! The Fan Fest went amazingly, didn't it!

text_block_list.name: Squad Member B
text_block_list.text: Let's all go out to celebrate! Are you good at karaoke?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
By that point, I think the whole squad was on board with our leader
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Now that the Fan Fest is over, we've gone back to our normal,
cheer-practice-free lives. We might not have a squad captain
anymore, but...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: How many times, Sky?! Next time, I won't be so forgiving!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Hey, King. These free spirit types giving you a hard time?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good to see you, Nature.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I hear your rivalry with Teio is heating up. The people from the
shopping district told me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Urk... Those guys don't know how to keep a secret.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! If you ever need a training partner, let me know! I'm happy to
help you out anytime!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In that case, how about you come for coffee with me every once in a
while? Just having someone to vent to a little would be help enough.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
And, while we're there, I can encourage a certain former cheer
captain in all her hard work too. If she needs it, of course.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why not!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Were you thinking of going to a cafe? Or the shopping district,
perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind either way. The vending machine that sells red bean soup
would work just fine too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(...King and I still hold on to a little of the camaraderie we shared in
those cheer squad days together.)
